title: Patent Drafting AI Agent
association: National Yang Ming Chiao Tung University
summary: AI-powered patent specification generator using Claude Sonnet 4, with prompt engineering and legal JSON-to-document pipelines.
description:
Developed a patent generation module using Claude Sonnet 4 compliant with legal standards.

Designed a template-based fallback system for reliability when AI services are unavailable.

Implemented prompt engineering and streaming generation for accurate and professional outputs.

Built structured JSON-to-document pipelines ensuring legal formatting (claims hierarchy, numbering).

title: KIBO Robot Object Recognition Model
summary: CNN-based object recognition system for the KIBO Robot Programming Challenge 2024 Taiwan Preliminary. Achieved Honorable Mention.
description:
Participated in the KIBO Robot Programming Challenge 2024 Taiwan Preliminary to develop an object recognition system for the robot.

Utilized CNN and image processing techniques to train the robot to recognize and classify various objects using computer vision.

Achieved Honorable Mention at the Taiwan Space Agency (TASA) Taiwan Preliminary.

title: Real-Time Traffic Violation Monitoring System
association: Taipei City Fanghe Experimental High School
summary: Edge computing system detecting red-light running and pedestrian yielding violations using YOLOv5, EasyOCR and transfer learning.
description:
Developed an edge computing system to detect common traffic violations, including running red lights and failing to yield to pedestrians.

Utilized transfer learning to identify traffic lights and adapted YOLOv5 and EasyOCR for automatic license plate recognition.

Awarded Honorable Mention in the Computer and Information Science category at the 57th Taipei City Science Fair.
